\tzpentry{ID5914}{Donut Holes Equation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5914 introduces Donut Holes Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \nabla^2_{S^2} f = \frac{1}{\sin\theta} \frac{\partial}{\partial \theta} \left( \sin\theta \frac{\partial f}{\partial \theta} \right) + \frac{1}{\sin^2\theta} \frac{\partial^2 f}{\partial \phi^2} \end{equation}
